# idsec_identity_tenant_suffixes (Data Source)

The Identity service tenant suffixes data source. It reads the tenant suffixes information.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "idsec_identity_tenant_suffixes" "tenant_suffixes" {}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `default_suffix` (String) The tenant default suffix.
- `suffixes` (List of String) List of tenant default suffixes.
